name: Artie Lange
bio: Artie Lange is an American stand-up comedian, actor, and radio personality best known as a cast member of MADtv (1995-1997) and as a longtime sidekick on The Howard Stern Show (2001-2009). He wrote and starred in the 2006 film Beer League and authored the number-one bestseller Too Fat to Fish. His work and public life have been marked by widely reported struggles with addiction.

timeline.ev: Becomes a regular on The Howard Stern Show
Memoir Too Fat to Fish debuts at number one on the New York Times list
Releases stand-up special Jack and Coke

accolades: Too Fat to Fish: number-one New York Times bestseller (2008)
